TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: pgyan nha loziy ru kiyay balay lga rasun nha ngasal ru san ha smi khu nha la, san nha smi khu lru kbalay squ gaga la, mkayal squ san mha qutux niqan san mha ga mtswe kwara qasa,nanu mtswe lga klayo ta gaga ru aki ta tmalam squ giqas nqu i pincywagan qani ru ana ta muciy nanu maniq lga swalan ta nya utux kayal la muciy ga yasa qu pSyus ta, knwan qu mkayal muciy knwan qu musa ta syun pSyus ta qaniy ga a sonun nha ryax, nanu ryax ru nanu yasa muciy ma Ikoripay lga musa ta ini ga Ikoripay ini ga mpuw bingi lga pSyus ta l'ay muciy lga, mkayal lru nanu zik na pSyus ta qaniy ga a hata i mlata, musa ta mlata ru hata kangi cikay iwan nqu bes nqu Smyus, qaniy ga aki maki tlaman nqu laqi ru kneril muciy qu inlungan nqu mrkyas mlikiy ru likuy ga, nanu sonun nha ryax muciy ma ska byacing qaniy ga hata mgluw musa qzyunam musa kangi cikay san muciy ma Rezo ga qsinuw ga,
S.PHON: pɣjan nħa lozij ru kijaj βalaj lɣa ras~ɕun nħa ŋas~ɕal ru s~ɕan ħa s~ɕmi kħu nħa la, s~ɕan nħa s~ɕmi kħu lru kβalaj s~ɕqu ɣaɣa la, mkajal s~ɕqu s~ɕan mħa qutux niqan s~ɕan mħa ɣa mts~ɕwe kwara qas~ɕa,nanu mts~ɕwe lɣa klajo ta ɣaɣa ru aki ta tmalam s~ɕqu ɣiqas~ɕ nqu i pinʦ~ʨjwaɣan qani ru ana ta muʦ~ʨij nanu maniq lɣa s~ɕwalan ta nja utux kajal la muʦ~ʨij ɣa jas~ɕa qu ps~ɕjus~ɕ ta, knwan qu mkajal muʦ~ʨij knwan qu mus~ɕa ta s~ɕjun ps~ɕjus~ɕ ta qanij ɣa a s~ɕonun nħa rjax, nanu rjax ru nanu jas~ɕa muʦ~ʨij ma ikoripaj lɣa mus~ɕa ta ini ɣa ikoripaj ini ɣa mpuw βiŋi lɣa ps~ɕjus~ɕ ta lʔaj muʦ~ʨij lɣa, mkajal lru nanu zik na ps~ɕjus~ɕ ta qanij ɣa a ħata i mlata, mus~ɕa ta mlata ru ħata kaŋi ʦ~ʨikaj iwan nqu βes~ɕ nqu s~ɕmjus~ɕ, qanij ɣa aki maki tlaman nqu laqi ru kneril muʦ~ʨij qu inluŋan nqu mrkjas~ɕ mlikij ru likuj ɣa, nanu s~ɕonun nħa rjax muʦ~ʨij ma s~ɕka βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qanij ɣa ħata mɣluw mus~ɕa qzjunam mus~ɕa kaŋi ʦ~ʨikaj s~ɕan muʦ~ʨij ma rezo ɣa qs~ɕinuw ɣa,
S.FORM: pgyan nha loziy ru kiyay balay lga rasun nha ngasal ru san ha smi khu nha la, san nha smi khu lru kbalay squ gaga la, mkayal squ san mha qutux niqan san mha ga mtswe kwara qasa,nanu mtswe lga klayo ta gaga ru aki ta tmalam squ giqas nqu i pincywagan qani ru ana ta muciy nanu maniq lga swalan ta nya utux kayal la muciy ga yasa qu pSyus ta, knwan qu mkayal muciy knwan qu musa ta syun pSyus ta qaniy ga a sonun nha ryax, nanu ryax ru nanu yasa muciy ma Ikoripay lga musa ta ini ga Ikoripay ini ga mpuw bingi lga pSyus ta l'ay muciy lga, mkayal lru nanu zik na pSyus ta qaniy ga a hata i mlata, musa ta mlata ru hata kangi cikay iwan nqu bes nqu Smyus, qaniy ga aki maki tlaman nqu laqi ru kneril muciy qu inlungan nqu mrkyas mlikiy ru likuy ga, nanu sonun nha ryax muciy ma ska byacing qaniy ga hata mgluw musa qzyunam musa kangi cikay san muciy ma Rezo ga qsinuw ga,
S.PHON: pɣjan nħa lozij ru kijaj βalaj lɣa ras~ɕun nħa ŋas~ɕal ru s~ɕan ħa s~ɕmi kħu nħa la, s~ɕan nħa s~ɕmi kħu lru kβalaj s~ɕqu ɣaɣa la, mkajal s~ɕqu s~ɕan mħa qutux niqan s~ɕan mħa ɣa mts~ɕwe kwara qas~ɕa,nanu mts~ɕwe lɣa klajo ta ɣaɣa ru aki ta tmalam s~ɕqu ɣiqas~ɕ nqu i pinʦ~ʨjwaɣan qani ru ana ta muʦ~ʨij nanu maniq lɣa s~ɕwalan ta nja utux kajal la muʦ~ʨij ɣa jas~ɕa qu ps~ɕjus~ɕ ta, knwan qu mkajal muʦ~ʨij knwan qu mus~ɕa ta s~ɕjun ps~ɕjus~ɕ ta qanij ɣa a s~ɕonun nħa rjax, nanu rjax ru nanu jas~ɕa muʦ~ʨij ma ikoripaj lɣa mus~ɕa ta ini ɣa ikoripaj ini ɣa mpuw βiŋi lɣa ps~ɕjus~ɕ ta lʔaj muʦ~ʨij lɣa, mkajal lru nanu zik na ps~ɕjus~ɕ ta qanij ɣa a ħata i mlata, mus~ɕa ta mlata ru ħata kaŋi ʦ~ʨikaj iwan nqu βes~ɕ nqu s~ɕmjus~ɕ, qanij ɣa aki maki tlaman nqu laqi ru kneril muʦ~ʨij qu inluŋan nqu mrkjas~ɕ mlikij ru likuj ɣa, nanu s~ɕonun nħa rjax muʦ~ʨij ma s~ɕka βjaʦ~ʨiŋ qanij ɣa ħata mɣluw mus~ɕa qzjunam mus~ɕa kaŋi ʦ~ʨikaj s~ɕan muʦ~ʨij ma rezo ɣa qs~ɕinuw ɣa,
